We now SEE Brad's fingers ZOOM in close on a PHOTO of Craig, his WIFE and TWO DAUGHTERS all smiles, at an event. ON BRAD - illuminated by the light of the phone, he grimaces. He puts the phone down. He looks back up at the ceiling.
